title: Mutual Friends & A Comeback 🤝
excerpt: Added two revolutionary updates and we are back on Chrome.
body: Recently, Friends Remover was hit hard by the removal of our extension. After weeks of rebuilding and improving, we're finally back—and stronger than ever. This may be our biggest update yet, bringing massive new features, major improvements, and countless bug fixes. We hope you enjoy this update, as it may be our last major update for a while. Thank you to everyone who continued to support Friends Remover throughout this journey. We couldn't have made this comeback without you.

added.text: Special welcome messages in popup menu
added.moreInfo: Displays custom welcome messages for FR+ users when opening the popup.

added.text: Flagged filter for users flagged by Rotectors API
added.moreInfo: You can now filter by 'flagged' in the popup.

Recommends friends you should pin based on how long you've been friends and how many mutual friends you share. It recommends up to five users and is randomized. It can be turned off in the General settings tab.
You can see if a friend is also a friend of another user. It appears on the right side of their avatar. You can click a mutual friend to view them in Compact Viewer.

FR+ is now a subscription-based system costing 115 Robux per month instead of a gamepass. Existing gamepass owners will be granted FR+. If the subscription expires or is canceled, FR+ access will be removed.
Users must enter an email before purchasing FR+ for verification.
Users must accept the FR+ terms before purchasing FR+.
Secure your account from misuse of Friends Remover to remove all friends. To reset your password, go to the Discord server.
You can now view how long you have been friends with any user in Compact Viewer. This replaces the old bio text display.

removed.text: Filter by account age setting (fully removed)
removed.moreInfo: This filter has been permanently removed and will not return.

removed.text: Notify if a Friend Removes You is no longer Plus-only
removed.moreInfo: This FR+ feature has been removed to improve free user experience.
The Rocaptcha system has been fully removed from extension settings.

fixed.text: Settings no longer switch to mobile UI when resizing
fixed.moreInfo: Resizing the settings page no longer forces mobile UI mode.

fixed.text: Search and filter buttons now properly disable during loading/menu
fixed.moreInfo: Prevents user actions during loading states.

fixed.text: Block mode logo no longer appears on popup open
fixed.moreInfo: Fixed an issue where the block mode logo appeared incorrectly on startup.

fixed.text: Fixed incorrect theme showing during loading (cached theme fix)
fixed.moreInfo: The last applied theme now loads instantly without reverting to default.

fixed.text: Unpin button fixed for banned accounts
fixed.moreInfo: Fixed an issue where unpin actions did not work correctly for banned accounts.

fixed.text: Menu now opens correctly when reopened
fixed.moreInfo: Fixed a bug where the menu would fail to open if previously opened.

fixed.text: Fixed 'undefined removed from friends list' notification
fixed.moreInfo: Fixed notification bug causing incorrect usernames to appear.

fixed.text: Search button fixed after closing history
fixed.moreInfo: Restores search functionality after exiting history.

fixed.text: UserDataManager method fixed (setSetting vs saveSetting mismatch)
fixed.moreInfo: Fixed broken settings saving caused by incorrect method calls.

improved.text: Compact viewer arrows now loop continuously
improved.moreInfo: Smooth infinite navigation in compact view.
Faster and more reliable FR+ detection on startup.

improved.text: Popup handling of active removals improved
improved.moreInfo: Improved stability when managing active friend removals.

improved.text: Resume system for ongoing removals improved
improved.moreInfo: Improved continuation of paused removal processes.
Cleaner display for long game titles.

improved.text: Sent state now persists using local storage
improved.moreInfo: Sent status remains saved even after reopening history.
Instant UI updates after untrusting a friend.

improved.text: Bulk selection now persists after popup reopen
improved.moreInfo: Selection state is preserved after reopening.

other.text: Schedule Removal now shows FR+ toast for non-Plus users
other.moreInfo: Previously allowed setup without FR+, now properly restricted.

other.text: Status updated to show logged-in username
other.moreInfo: Displays username instead of user ID in the status bar.

other.text: Rocaptcha now removes headless and same-color avatars from puzzle pool
other.moreInfo: Skips avatars that are headless or visually identical.

other.text: Pre-send check shows toast if already friends
Rate limit handling (429) shows cooldown toast
other.moreInfo: Shows cooldown message when rate-limited and allows retry.

other.text: Unpin option added to three-dots menu (bulk select only)
other.moreInfo: Allows bulk unpinning from the menu.

other.text: Menu can now be accessed during removal screen
other.moreInfo: Menu remains accessible during active operations.

other.text: FR+ features now run without API calls using ownership detection
other.moreInfo: Improves performance by verifying FR+ locally.
